name: dotnet-testing-advanced-tunit-advanced
description: TUnit 進階應用完整指南 - 資料驅動測試、依賴注入與整合測試實戰。涵蓋 MethodDataSource、ClassDataSource、Matrix Tests、Properties 過濾。包含 Retry/Timeout 控制、WebApplicationFactory 整合、Testcontainers 多服務編排。 Keywords: TUnit advanced, TUnit 進階, MethodDataSource, ClassDataSource, Matrix Tests, MatrixDataSource, MicrosoftDependencyInjectionDataSource, Property, Retry, Timeout, 資料驅動測試, 測試過濾, WebApplicationFactory TUnit, 多容器編排
